/usr/bin/ar qc ../lib/libengine_core.a CMakeFiles/engine_core.dir/core/ce_math.c.o CMakeFiles/engine_core.dir/core/ce_memory.c.o CMakeFiles/engine_core.dir/core/ce_platform.c.o CMakeFiles/engine_core.dir/core/ce_time.c.o CMakeFiles/engine_core.dir/ebpf/ce_lsm.c.o CMakeFiles/engine_core.dir/ebpf/ce_stream_parser.c.o CMakeFiles/engine_core.dir/ebpf/ce_uring_bpf.c.o CMakeFiles/engine_core.dir/ebpf/ce_uring_bpf_io.c.o CMakeFiles/engine_core.dir/ebpf/ce_xdp.c.o CMakeFiles/engine_core.dir/ecs/ce_ecs.c.o CMakeFiles/engine_core.dir/log/ce_log.c.o CMakeFiles/engine_core.dir/network/ce_async_posix.c.o CMakeFiles/engine_core.dir/network/ce_async_uring.c.o CMakeFiles/engine_core.dir/network/ce_ebpf.c.o CMakeFiles/engine_core.dir/network/ce_kcp.c.o CMakeFiles/engine_core.dir/network/ce_kcp_lua.c.o CMakeFiles/engine_core.dir/network/ce_net_base.c.o CMakeFiles/engine_core.dir/network/ce_net_base_lua.c.o CMakeFiles/engine_core.dir/network/ce_network.c.o CMakeFiles/engine_core.dir/network/ce_rpc_call.c.o CMakeFiles/engine_core.dir/network/ce_rpc_call_lua.c.o CMakeFiles/engine_core.dir/network/ikcp.c.o CMakeFiles/engine_core.dir/plugin/ce_plugin.c.o CMakeFiles/engine_core.dir/render/ce_rhi_vulkan.c.o CMakeFiles/engine_core.dir/replication/ce_mailbox.c.o CMakeFiles/engine_core.dir/replication/ce_replication.c.o CMakeFiles/engine_core.dir/replication/ce_rpc_channel.c.o CMakeFiles/engine_core.dir/runtime/ce_engine.c.o CMakeFiles/engine_core.dir/script/ce_lua.c.o
/usr/bin/ranlib ../lib/libengine_core.a
